objective: Complete Capsule v1 and v2 autonomously through the GitHub/Symphony-style issue graph.
rules: Keep macOS awake with caffeinate while the runner is active.
Open atomic pull requests from autopilot/issue-N branches.
Do not run live provider operations unless CAPSULE_LIVE_TESTS=1 and required credentials are present.
Treat open pull requests as in-review work and skip duplicate execution.
